mapper.sql: select evaluation_id, order_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, score, content, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, remark from tr_trade_evaluation
mapper.insert:
insert into tr_trade_evaluation
order_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, score, content, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, remark,
#{orderId}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update tr_trade_evaluation set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where evaluation_id = #{evaluationId}

update tr_trade_evaluation set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where evaluation_id in
#{evaluationId}
mapper.select: select e.evaluation_id, e.order_id, e.from_user_id, e.to_user_id, e.score, e.content, e.create_time, fu.nickname as from_user_name, fu.avatar as from_user_avatar, tu.nickname as to_user_name, tu.avatar as to_user_avatar, o.goods_title, o.goods_images, o.trade_price as goods_price from tr_trade_evaluation e left join tr_student_user fu on e.from_user_id = fu.user_id left join tr_student_user tu on e.to_user_id = tu.user_id left join tr_trade_order o on e.order_id = o.order_id where e.del_flag = '0' and e.to_user_id = #{userId} order by e.create_time desc

select e.evaluation_id, e.order_id, e.from_user_id, e.to_user_id, e.score, e.content, e.create_time, fu.nickname as from_user_name, fu.avatar as from_user_avatar, tu.nickname as to_user_name, tu.avatar as to_user_avatar, o.goods_title, o.goods_images, o.trade_price as goods_price from tr_trade_evaluation e left join tr_student_user fu on e.from_user_id = fu.user_id left join tr_student_user tu on e.to_user_id = tu.user_id left join tr_trade_order o on e.order_id = o.order_id where e.del_flag = '0' and e.from_user_id = #{userId} order by e.create_time desc
select score, count(1) as cnt from tr_trade_evaluation where del_flag = '0' and to_user_id = #{userId} group by score
